2604.24971.title: PolyKV: A Shared Asymmetrically-Compressed KV Cache Pool for Multi-Agent LLM Inference
2604.24971.paper_summary: We present PolyKV, a system in which multiple concurrent inference agents share a single, asymmetrically compressed KV cache pool. Rather than allocating a separate KV cache per agent -- the standard paradigm -- PolyKV writes a compressed cache once and injects it into N independent agent contexts via HuggingFace DynamicCache objects. Compression is asymmetric: Keys are quantized at int8 (q8_0) to preserve softmax stability, while Values are compressed using TurboQuant MSE -- a Fast Walsh-Hadamard Transform (FWHT) rotation followed by 3-bit Lloyd-Max quantization with centroids tuned to N(0,1). We evaluate across two model scales (SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct and Llama-3-8B-Instruct), three context lengths (600-7,194 tokens), and up to 15 concurrent agents. PolyKV achieves a stable 2.91x compression ratio across all configurations. On Llama-3-8B with 15 agents sharing a 4K-token context, PolyKV reduces KV cache memory from 19.8 GB to 0.45 GB -- a 97.7% reduction -- while maintaining only +0.57% perplexity degradation and a mean BERTScore F1 of 0.928. PPL delta does not grow with agent count and improves as context length increases, inverting to -0.26% at 1,851 coherent tokens. To our knowledge, no prior work combines a single shared, lossy-compressed KV pool with multi-reader concurrent agent access.
2604.24971.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了PolyKV，這是一個多個並發推理代理共享單一不對稱壓縮KV快取池的系統。與為每個代理分配單獨的KV快取——標準範式——不同，PolyKV僅寫入一次壓縮快取，並通過HuggingFace DynamicCache對象將其注入N個獨立的代理上下文中。壓縮是非對稱的：鍵以int8（q8_0）量化，以保持softmax的穩定性，而值則使用TurboQuant MSE進行壓縮——這是一種快速Walsh-Hadamard變換（FWHT）旋轉，然後進行3位Lloyd-Max量化，質心調整為N(0,1)。我們在兩個模型規模（SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct和Llama-3-8B-Instruct）、三個上下文長度（600-7,194個標記）和最多15個並發代理中進行評估。PolyKV在所有配置中實現了穩定的2.91倍壓縮比。在Llama-3-8B上，15個代理共享4K標記的上下文，PolyKV將KV快取內存從19.8 GB減少到0.45 GB——減少了97.7%——同時僅維持+0.57%的困惑度降級和平均BERTScore F1為0.928。PPL增量不隨代理數量增長，並隨著上下文長度的增加而改善，在1,851個連貫標記時反轉為-0.26%。據我們所知，之前的工作中沒有任何一項將單一共享的有損壓縮KV池與多讀者並發代理訪問相結合。
2604.24971.author: Ishan Patel et.al.
